About the Filmmaker

NIRAV AJUDIA

A passionate filmmaker and visual storyteller with experience spanning narrative shorts, documentaries, commercials, and cinematic event coverage. Focused on delivering emotionally resonant content that connects with audiences worldwide.

PROJECTS IN THIS COLLECTION

About

NIRAV AJUDIA

Nirav Ajudia is a filmmaker and visual storyteller dedicated to delivering dreams to the screens. With a diverse portfolio spanning narrative short films, documentaries, commercial advertising, cinematic event coverage, and community-driven projects, Nirav brings a unique perspective shaped by multicultural experiences and a deep commitment to authentic storytelling.

Whether crafting an emotionally charged short film, capturing the energy of a live event, or producing polished commercial content, Nirav approaches each project with cinematic precision and a collaborative spirit. His work has explored themes ranging from environmental awareness and cultural heritage to personal narratives and brand storytelling.

Get in Touch YouTube Channel

SKILLS & EXPERTISE

🎬
Filmmaking
Directing, cinematography, and visual storytelling
✂️
Editing
Post-production, color grading, and final cut
📹
Videography
Events, weddings, and corporate shoots
📺
Commercial Ads
Brand storytelling and advertising production
🎭
Virtual Production
LED volumes, mocap, and real-time VFX
📖
Screenwriting
Script development and narrative structure

CAREER HIGHLIGHTS

2026
Virtual Production Projects
Expanding into LED volume virtual production and in-camera VFX techniques
2025
Expanded Portfolio
Produced over 50 projects across films, commercials, events, and community work
2024
Workshop Development
Scene study workshops covering motion capture, virtual production, and acting technique
2023
Event Coverage Growth
Established a strong presence in Brisbane's event and wedding videography market
2022
Community Film Projects
Began creating documentary and cultural content for community organisations
